scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter @lore-context/server build && pnpm --filter @lore/api build && node apps/api/dist/index.js
scripts.smoke:hosted-mcp: pnpm --filter @lore-context/server build && pnpm --filter @lore/api build && node scripts/smoke-hosted-mcp.mjs
scripts.smoke:rc1-guardrails: pnpm --filter @lore/eval build && pnpm --filter @lore/api build && node scripts/smoke-rc1-guardrails.mjs
scripts.smoke:rc2-lane-e: pnpm --filter @lore/model-gateway build && pnpm --filter @lore-context/server build && node scripts/smoke-rc2-lane-e.mjs
scripts.verify:rc1-performance: pnpm --filter @lore/eval build && node -e "import('./packages/eval/dist/index.js').then(m => { const r = m.buildRc1PerformanceGate(m.buildCaptureAckReport([]), m.buildCandidateGenerationReport([]), m.buildRecallApiReport([])); console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); })"
